name: grok
description: Delegate reviews to a subscription-backed Grok web session through a local tunnel.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate to subscription-backed Grok through a local tunnel.
interface.longDescription: Invoke Grok through an explicit subscription-backed local web-session tunnel for review, adversarial-review, and custom-review workflows.
defaultPrompt: Ask Grok to review the current diff using my subscription
Ask Grok for an adversarial review through the local tunnel
Run a Grok custom review of selected files
